title: Chestplate With Elytra
description: let you combined Chestplate With Elytra
body:
## This datapack let you combine Chestplates With Elytra
 

**For 1.19-1.20.2:**
The datapack let you combine iron/diamond/netherite chestplates With Elytra
> In order to combined chestplate with elytra:
> you need to throw the chestplate and elytra on the same block
> (the chestplate with elytra will keep the enchantments that which were on the chestplate)
> 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zLWueKrvtLk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**For 1.21.5-1.21.8:**

- Three Fixed bugs:
> 1. Items will no longer disappear when you die with a chestplate and an elytra in you inventory.
> 2. Now you can enchant your chestplate with elytra.
> 3. Now you can see the chestplate and the elytra when equipped.

- Added 3 new variants of the chestplate with elytra.
- All crafting recipes are in the crafting table now. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7CWbP8nNQ-Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
